id.description: Unique identifier — required for label association and ARIA wiring.

inputValue.description: Free-text input value (the text the user has typed). Bindable.

label.description: Visible label rendered in a `<label>` associated via `for`.

placeholder.description: Placeholder when no value is selected.

description.description: Helper text displayed below the input; wired via aria-describedby.

disabled.description: Disables the combobox. Inherited from a wrapping FormField when unset.

required.description:
Marks the field required: renders the required marker on the label and
sets `aria-required` on the input. Inherited from a wrapping FormField
when unset.

maxVisibleOptions.description: Hard cap on visible filtered options. Default 200.

aria-describedby.description:
External element id(s) to compose into `aria-describedby`. Composed
after the component-generated description and error ids, matching the
field-control contract in Select. Useful for tooltip ids, counter ids,
or any external hint.

unsupportedProps.name: filter
unsupportedProps.description:
Custom synchronous filter. Receives an option and the current input
value; returns true to keep. Defaults to case-insensitive substring
match on label.

unsupportedProps.name: options
unsupportedProps.description: Full set of options to filter. The sole inference source for T.

unsupportedProps.name: value
unsupportedProps.description: Currently selected value. Bindable. `''` when nothing is selected.
